Class ClanWarpRepository

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.db.repositories.ClanWarpRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
IClanWarpRepository
public class ClanWarpRepository extends Object implements IClanWarpRepository
JDBI-backed implementation of IClanWarpRepository.

All blocking DB calls are dispatched to the shared database executor so the main thread is never blocked.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanWarpRepository

      public ClanWarpRepository(org.jdbi.v3.core.Jdbi jdbi, ExecutorService executor)
      Parameters:
      jdbi - the JDBI instance for database access
      executor - the shared database executor for async dispatch

  • Method Details

    • saveWarp

      public CompletableFuture<Void> saveWarp(ClanWarpModel model)
      Description copied from interface: IClanWarpRepository
      Inserts a warp, or updates the location, icon, and description of an existing one. Does not change the restricted flag.
      Specified by:
      saveWarp in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      model - the warp to persist
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is written

    • getWarp

      public CompletableFuture<Optional<ClanWarpModel>> getWarp(UUID clanId, String name)
      Specified by:
      getWarp in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      Returns:
      a future of the warp, or empty if none exists with that name

    • listWarps

      public CompletableFuture<List<ClanWarpModel>> listWarps(UUID clanId)
      Specified by:
      listWarps in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      Returns:
      a future of all warps the clan owns, ordered by name

    • countWarps

      public CompletableFuture<Integer> countWarps(UUID clanId)
      Specified by:
      countWarps in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      Returns:
      a future of the number of warps the clan owns

    • deleteWarp

      public CompletableFuture<Void> deleteWarp(UUID clanId, String name)
      Description copied from interface: IClanWarpRepository
      Removes a warp. Its access rows are removed by the database cascade.
      Specified by:
      deleteWarp in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is deleted

    • setRestricted

      public CompletableFuture<Void> setRestricted(UUID clanId, String name, boolean restricted)
      Description copied from interface: IClanWarpRepository
      Sets whether a warp is restricted to its access list.
      Specified by:
      setRestricted in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      restricted - the new restriction state
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the change is persisted

    • grantAccess

      public CompletableFuture<Void> grantAccess(UUID clanId, String name, UUID playerId)
      Description copied from interface: IClanWarpRepository
      Grants a member access to a warp. Idempotent.
      Specified by:
      grantAccess in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      playerId - the member to grant
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the access row is written

    • revokeAccess

      public CompletableFuture<Void> revokeAccess(UUID clanId, String name, UUID playerId)
      Description copied from interface: IClanWarpRepository
      Revokes a member's access to a warp. No-op if not granted.
      Specified by:
      revokeAccess in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      playerId - the member to revoke
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the access row is removed

    • hasAccess

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> hasAccess(UUID clanId, String name, UUID playerId)
      Specified by:
      hasAccess in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      playerId - the member to test
      Returns:
      a future that is true if the member has access to the warp

    • listAccess

      public CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> listAccess(UUID clanId, String name)
      Specified by:
      listAccess in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      Returns:
      a future of the UUIDs of all members granted access to the warp

    • listAccessibleWarps

      public CompletableFuture<List<String>> listAccessibleWarps(UUID clanId, UUID playerId)
      Specified by:
      listAccessibleWarps in interface IClanWarpRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      playerId - the member to look up
      Returns:
      a future of the names of every warp the member has been granted access to
